name: link-cli-web
description: React and WebAssembly browser workbench for link-cli

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:web
scripts.build:pages: npm run build:wasm && DEPLOY_TARGET=github-pages npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run test:wasm && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist web/pkg pkg pkg-node pkg-bundler target
